function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0 -> Bool) { not Subsemiring.constraint[T0](x0) or exists(k0: Subsemiring[T0]) { Subsemiring.new[T0](x0) = Option.some[Subsemiring[T0]](k0) } }[S](full_subsemiring_contains[S])
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0 -> Bool) { Subsemiring.constraint[T0](x0) = subsemiring_constraint[T0](x0) }[S](full_subsemiring_contains[S])
function[T0: Semiring] { subsemiring_constraint[T0](full_subsemiring_contains[T0]) }[S]

function[T0: Semiring](x0: Subsemiring[T0], x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0) { Option.some[Subsemiring[T0]](x0) != Subsemiring.new[T0](x1) or x2 ∈ x0 = x1(x2) }[S](full_subsemiring[S], full_subsemiring_contains[S], a)
function[T0: Semiring] { Option.some[Subsemiring[T0]](full_subsemiring[T0]) = Subsemiring.new[T0](full_subsemiring_contains[T0]) }[S]
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0) { full_subsemiring_contains[T0](x0) }[S](a)
function[T0: Semiring](x0: Subsemiring[T0], x1: Subsemiring[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = subsemiring_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[S](s, full_subsemiring[S])
let w0: S satisfy { w0 ∈ s and not w0 ∈ full_subsemiring[S] }
function[T0: Semiring](x0: T0) { x0 ∈ full_subsemiring[T0] }[S](w0)
